title: record {}
manager: Named-field records `{ x: 1, y: 2 }` for structured data that deserves field names instead of tuple positions — the workhorse aggregate type. Structurally typed, so a function that wants `{ x, y }` accepts anything carrying those fields, and pattern-matchable so a `case` can destructure a record inline instead of reading fields one accessor at a time.
cs: record type + `{ }` literal; named fields, structural typing; pattern-matchable (W6.41); value equality.
